series_metadata.series_title: Lake Erie Shore Erosion Management Program Final Records
series_metadata.series_description: Final Lake Erie Shore Erosion Management Program (LESEMP) records to include copies of files used for publishing on-line at Coastal Management web page, and for use during training, guidance, and administration documents for continual program plan improvement.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: permanently or Superseded ; Electronic: permanently or Superseded
